channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: 'Paddington The Musical' heading to Broadway
item.description: 'GMA' exclusively announced that 'Paddington The Musical' will premiere at Broadway's Al Hirschfeld Theatre in 2027.

item.title: Can $100 million outweigh a Trump endorsement? Key races to watch Tuesday
item.description: A Trump endorsement carries significant weight in Republican primaries, but can it surpass $100 million in Georgia ad spending?

item.title: Watch: 'Moana' cast prepares for their journey
item.description: Dwayne Johnson and Catherine Laga'aia launched the live-action 'Moana' press tour as a new song debuts.

item.title: Iran says Israel must withdraw troops from Lebanon under U.S. deal
item.description: Iran's foreign minister states Israeli troops cannot remain in Lebanon under the pending agreement with the U.S.
